title: Shadows Stolen on Thriller Bark
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Moria, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Perona, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, what happened, Cindy- Chan!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And stop those false tears of yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: although we imagined... some kind of "miracle..."

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's fine, leave it to me!
